content_body: Amazing is the best word for the total experience. We stayed in the Serendipity cabin. The cabin is perfect for couples as it has 5 bedrooms with each having its own en-suite bathroom. There’s adequate seating all throughout the house. The game room downstairs is perfect with a pool table and they have every game you would want to play already there. The outside decks wrap around the whole back side of the house and are located on the main and lower level. Views are amazing! There’s a covered grilling area which was great since it was cold and we were still able to grill. They have all the essentials. Towels, cleaning supplies, laundry room and detergent you can use, tons of dishes pots and pans and baking pans. Everything is updated and gives you a more modern cabin feel. Lastly your booking comes with a app that gives you info on everything from dining, groceries, sight seeing, etc and each guest can have access to it. We will most definitely be back!
title: Amazing Experience!
